prompt_rules.description_brief: Write in an elevated, antique-dealer tone for LoomixRugs. Use full sentences, measured language, and a sense of quiet permanence. Avoid casual contractions. The rug is a 'singular piece' with memory and provenance. Interior designers are the target buyer.
prompt_rules.title_rules:
SIZE RULE: Round each ft dimension to the nearest whole number (2.8x9.9 → "3x10", 3.2x5.7 → "3x6", 3.6x9.3 → "4x9", 13.3x3.9 → "13x4"). Use ONLY the ROUNDED size in the title.
Pack in: size, style, colors, pattern, material, origin, room use, Etsy search terms.

FORMAT RULES: Use sentence case. Never repeat the same keyword twice. Never include shop name, price, or promotions.

CRITICAL VARIETY RULE: Do NOT default to the same opening pattern for every rug. Look at this rug's most distinctive feature and lead with THAT. Every title must feel written for this specific rug.

Choose ONE of these five openers based on what makes THIS rug stand out. Do NOT always pick the same one:

1. Size-first: "[size] ft [Origin] [Style] [Type] rug | [Color] [Pattern] wool [Room] | [style/feel]"
2. Color-first: "[Color] [Pattern] Turkish rug [size] ft | [Material] [Style] [Room] decor | [feel]"
3. Style/origin-first: "[Weave/style] Turkish [Type] [size] ft | [Color] [Pattern] wool — [Room] rug"
4. Room/use-first: "[Room] [Type] rug [size] ft | Turkish oushak [Color] [Pattern] wool | [Style]"
5. Condition/character-first: "[Condition] [Color] Turkish [Type] rug [size] ft | [Pattern] wool | [Room] decor"

HARD RULES:
- The rounded size MUST appear in the FIRST SEGMENT (before the first "|") AND within the first 40 characters.
  ✅ "8x5 ft distressed beige Turkish area rug | faded floral wool..."
  ❌ "Distressed beige Turkish area rug | 8x5 ft faded floral wool..."  ← WRONG, size is after "|"
- "Turkish" or "Oushak" MUST appear within the first 50 characters.
- Do NOT open with "Vintage" — let the size lead.
- Include color(s), pattern, origin, material, and room fit somewhere in the title.
- Never use "Persian" in the title. These are Turkish rugs.
prompt_rules.tag_rules: Each tag = a strong Etsy long-tail keyword phrase (2-4 words). Total exactly 13 tags, each max 20 chars. Cover size, color, type, origin/style, room fit, and buyer intent. Avoid repetitive openings and use the rounded size in size tags.
prompt_rules.opening_rules: Write one vivid first sentence using the rounded ft size, Turkish origin, and one specific visual observation from the rug photo.
prompt_rules.story_rules: Write 3-4 short paragraphs after the opening. Paragraph 1 should deepen the rug's visual identity and handmade character. Paragraph 2 should explain room fit and scale using the rounded size. Paragraph 3 should reinforce warmth, quality, and versatile styling in a premium but natural tone. Every rug must feel individually written.
